ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFFS' ALTERNATIVE REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE ALVA AND BRITT CASES TO DECEMBER 6, 2010 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ALL FOUR CASES IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RENEWING THE MOTION ON OR AFTER DECEMBER 6, 2010. THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/20/10 IS CONTINUED TO 12/6/10 AT 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206 AND THE CASE IS ADDED TO HAROWITZ GROUP 10, WD/MESO. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT DISCOVERY AND MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENTS WILL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE OF 12/6/10. HOWEVER, IF ANY PARTICULAR DEFENDANT FEELS UPON RECEIPT OF ANY WRITTEN DISCVOERY THAT MIGHT BE PROPOUNDED ON BY PLAINTIFFS THAT THEY HAVE BEEN UNFAIRLY BURDEN OR PREJUDICED, THEN PARTIES SHOULD MEET AND CONFER AND IF IT CAN'T BE RESOLVED, THEN PARTY MAY FILE AN EX PARTE APPLICATION.
